name: 01_ger40_london_open_range_breakout_m15
hypothesis: On GER40 M15, the first 60 minutes after the Frankfurt/London open (07:00-08:00 UTC) forms an opening range whose directional breakout during 08:00-11:00 UTC captures the institutional order flow imbalance, producing a positive-expectancy trend-day filter that Donchian-on-all-hours fails to isolate.

entry_rules.long: close > OR_high AND close - OR_high >= 0.25 * ATR(14) AND body >= 0.6 * ATR(14)
entry_rules.short: close < OR_low AND OR_low - close >= 0.25 * ATR(14) AND body >= 0.6 * ATR(14)

exit_rules.stop_loss: opposite side of opening range OR 1.0 * ATR(14), whichever is tighter

acceptance_notes: Expect ~1-2 trades per day per symbol across ~3 years => >500 trades on M15. Avoids the all-hours chop that killed the prior Donchian variant.
